text:
/ world today news/ The head of Greece ‚Äòs central bank said on Tuesday that bank deposits are returning at a ‚Äúsatisfactory pace‚Äù after last month‚Äôs decisive election results reduced uncertainty about the country‚Äôs stay in the eurozone .
Greek ‚Äúbanks went through a difficult period of losing deposits, but after the election, bank deposits are returning at a satisfactory pace,‚Äù said the governor of the Central Bank of Greece, Georgios Provopoulos, quoted by Reuters, Darik Finance reported.
